en: These are actually, Michelle, that's for you.
ko: 이건 사실, 미셸, 너를 위한 거야.

en: Alan, the time over there. Hugh, this is for you.
ko: 앨런, 저쪽 시간은 어때? 휴, 이건 너를 위한 거야.

en: This is a scene from Downton Abbey, an actual scene where you're trying to decide
ko: 이 장면은 다운튼 애비의 한 장면이야,

en: what to do to cover the costs because you're hard up for money.
And I would like it if you could please do it with American accents, not British accents.
And see if it doesn't bring you people... -♪♪
ko: 사람들이 더 끌릴지 한번 보자. 고마워.

en: Just bring you people down to earth a little bit. See if you still like us.
Exactly. All right, we open on Downton Abbey, a scene in progress.
ko: 좋아, 다운튼 애비에서 장면이 진행 중이야.

en: I want to explain why I think we should turn down Wavell's offer.
ko: 나는 왜 그렇게 생각하는지 설명하고 싶어.

en: I know, we are only the caretakers of Downton, but Dad, some things have to change.
True. True, but we mustn't destroy what we're trying to protect.
ko: 맞아, 하지만 우리가 보호하려는 것을 파괴해서는 안 돼.

en: Wavell would wreck this lovely place forever with his ugly, cheap houses.
ko: 웨이벨은 이 아름다운 곳을 영원히 망칠 거야.
